title: Uruguayan Pillowy Delight
description: A quick and delicious dish made with uruguayan flair. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: herbal
ingredients.notes: fresh herbs such as parsley or cilantro

ingredients.name: quick
ingredients.notes: quick-cooking vegetables such as bell peppers or zucchini

instructions: Boil the diced potatoes in a pot of salted water until they are tender.
In a separate pot, sauté the quick-cooking vegetables until they are softened.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, sautéed vegetables, and fresh herbs.
Crack in the egg and mix until the ingredients are well combined.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and top with the pillowy dough.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the dough is golden brown.
